creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212927
.shar

Audio Mixer with a Terminal User Interface built on the FreeBSD sound system.

Developed on:
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r352742 GENERIC  amd64

Testing:

 * portlint -A
 * port test
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o audio/mixertui
 * poudriere testport -j 121Ramd64 -p default -i -o audio/mixertui
